title: Error
generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
validationError: Invalid input. Please check your data.
timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

microphone.title: Microphone Error
microphone.permissionDenied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
microphone.notFound: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone and try again.
microphone.notReadable: Microphone is already in use by another application. Please close other apps using the microphone.
microphone.constraintsError: Unable to satisfy audio constraints. Please try a different microphone.
microphone.abortError: Microphone access was aborted. Please try again.
microphone.securityError: Microphone access is not allowed due to security restrictions. Please use HTTPS or localhost.
microphone.notSupported: Your browser does not support audio recording. Please use a modern browser like Chrome, Firefox, or Safari.
microphone.lowVolume: Your microphone volume is very low. Please speak louder or adjust your microphone settings.
microphone.noAudio: No audio detected. Please check your microphone.

instructions.chrome: In Chrome: Click the lock icon in the address bar → Site settings → Microphone → Allow
instructions.firefox: In Firefox: Click the lock icon in the address bar → Permissions → Microphone → Allow
instructions.safari: In Safari: Safari menu → Settings for This Website → Microphone → Allow
instructions.edge: In Edge: Click the lock icon in the address bar → Site permissions → Microphone → Allow

websocket.title: Connection Error
websocket.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to server. Please check your internet connection.
websocket.reconnectFailed: Failed to reconnect after {maxAttempts} attempts. Please refresh the page.
websocket.authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Please log in again.
websocket.timeout: Connection timed out. Please try again.

audio.title: Audio Error
audio.processingFailed: Audio processing failed. Please try again.
audio.recordingFailed: Failed to start recording. Please check your microphone.
audio.playbackFailed: Failed to play audio. Please try again.
audio.encodingFailed: Audio encoding failed. Please try again.
audio.decodingFailed: Audio decoding failed. Please try again.
audio.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected. Please speak into the microphone.

api.title: API Error
api.aiFailed: AI response generation failed. Please try again.
api.timeout: Processing is taking longer than expected. Please wait...

session.title: Session Error
session.expired: Session has expired. Please start a new session.
session.alreadyActive: A session is already active. Please end the current session first.
session.startFailed: Failed to start session. Please try again.
session.endFailed: Failed to end session. Please try again.

rateLimit.title: 傳送速度限制
rateLimit.message: 您的音訊傳送速度過快，請等待 {seconds} 秒。
rateLimit.guidance: 系統需要時間處理您的音訊。這有助於確保高品質的回應。
